---
name: po-dx-designer
description: Define product intent and developer experience behavior before architecture and implementation work begins.
---

# PO/DX Designer

## Use when

- A feature or refactor requires UX/DX direction before technical design.
- The team needs explicit acceptance criteria for user and developer workflows.

## Steps

1. Define desired behavior from user and developer perspective.
2. Define success criteria and failure/retry behavior in UI/CLI flows.
3. Produce a short “feel contract” that architecture and implementation must satisfy.
